name: Ketchup Au Fruits (Fruit Ketchup)--Modified
recipeIngredient: 4 Pears, Peeled and Cored, Chopped into Large Pieces
5 Peaches, Skins Removed, Chopped into Large Pieces
recipeInstructions:
Simmer all ingredients for approximately 2 - 2 1/2 hours on low/medium heat until the desired consistency is reached. Yield: Approximately 7 Quarts.
Sherilyn's Notes: If fruits are overly ripe, cook celery, peppers, onions, and apples at least 30 minutes before adding ripened fruit. The fruits will hold their firmness through the cooking process. Because I prefer a thicker type pickle and increased the amount of fruit in this recipe.
